name: velocitydrop
description: Discord bot for on-demand game server management

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=bot" "npm run dev --workspace=api" "npm run dev --workspace=web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=bot && npm run build --workspace=api && npm run build --workspace=web && npm run build --workspace=server-manager && npm run build --workspace=site
scripts.db:migrate: cd prisma && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:reset: cd prisma && npx prisma migrate reset
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate
